evals.prompt: I scanned an old book chapter to a PDF, it's at /tmp/ocr_test/book.pdf. Can you OCR all the pages and give me one markdown file with the text?
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/ocr.py on the PDF, produces outputs/book/result.md combining both pages with their text; tells the user where result.md is.

evals.prompt: There's a folder of page screenshots at /tmp/ocr_test/imgs — extract the text from all of them into markdown.
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/ocr.py on the directory, OCRs both images in natural order, writes a combined result.md.

evals.prompt: read the text off this iphone photo /tmp/ocr_test/iphone.heic
evals.expected_output: Handles HEIC (converts to PNG), runs OCR with --no-crop is acceptable, returns the recognized text.

evals.prompt: I have a receipt photo from my phone, can you pull out the total and the date? It's at /tmp/ocr_test/iphone.heic
evals.expected_output: Uses the skill to OCR the HEIC receipt, then reads the total/date from the recognized text.
